title: Banking book · transition risk · credit quality by sector + emissions + maturity
summary: Exposures by NACE sector with associated GHG emissions (Scope 1+2+3 absolute and intensity) and residual maturity buckets.
narrative: Sector buckets follow NACE Rev 2.1 sections C, D, F, H. Emissions sourced from ALQUID NZ (PCAF v3 banking book) for the 487 corporate counterparties. Residual maturity buckets: ≤1y, 1-5y, 5-10y, >10y. Stage 1/2/3 split per IFRS 9.

title: Banking book · transition risk · loans collateralised by immovable property · EPC label
summary: Mortgage book exposures broken down by EPC label of the collateral, with LTV and energy-efficiency metrics.
narrative: EPC labels A-G aggregated from public registries (España + EU). Collateral with no EPC tagged separately. LTV computed on origination value; recalibration scheduled annually.

title: Banking book · transition risk · alignment metrics
summary: Implied Temperature Rise (ITR) and SBTi alignment per sector, vs 1.5°C / 2°C / >2°C scenarios.
narrative: ITR computed via PACTA methodology over the financed corporate book. Sectors: power, cement, steel, oil & gas, real estate, heavy transport. **Methodology gap**: oil & gas Scope 3.11 (use of sold products) coverage is partial — pending Climate X dataset upgrade.

title: Banking book · transition risk · top 20 carbon-intensive firms
summary: Exposure to the 20 largest carbon-intensive corporate counterparties in the book, with emissions and EAD.
narrative: Counterparties ranked by absolute Scope 1+2 emissions in the financed inventory. Top 20 fixed list approved by Risk Committee in Oct 2025; revisited annually.

title: Banking book · physical risk · exposures subject to physical risk
summary: Banking book exposures by sector and geography, flagged for physical climate risk (acute + chronic).
narrative: Hazard mapping via Climate X (high-resolution flood + heat + wildfire under RCP 4.5 and RCP 8.5). Sector breakdown matches TBL 1. Geographic granularity: NUTS-2 for EU, country-level for non-EU.

title: Summary of KPIs on Taxonomy-aligned exposures
summary: High-level Taxonomy KPIs: alignment %, eligibility %, total covered assets, by environmental objective.
narrative: Aggregates feed into TBLs 7-9. Two of the six EU environmental objectives covered: climate change mitigation + adaptation. Other four (water, circular economy, pollution, biodiversity) phased-in 2027.

title: Mitigating actions · assets for the calculation of GAR
summary: Numerator and denominator components of the Green Asset Ratio: Taxonomy-aligned assets, total covered assets.
narrative: Alignment criteria per Climate Delegated Act + Disclosures Delegated Act. Excluded: SME counterparties without Taxonomy reporting obligation, central bank exposures, sovereign exposures.

title: Mitigating actions · GAR (%)
summary: Final GAR ratio with breakdown by environmental objective and counterparty type.
narrative: Q4 2025 GAR estimated at 14.2%. Breakdown: climate change mitigation 11.8%, climate change adaptation 2.4%. Stock + flow KPIs both reported.

title: Mitigating actions · BTAR
summary: Banking Book Taxonomy-Aligned Ratio: Taxonomy alignment of exposures to non-financial corporates not covered by GAR.
narrative: Phased-in disclosure starting from 2026 reporting period. Includes SME and non-EU counterparties excluded from GAR. Methodology mirrors GAR but with relaxed evidence requirements.

title: Other climate change mitigating actions
summary: Qualitative + quantitative disclosure of products + services not captured by GAR/BTAR (sustainability-linked loans, transition finance, green bonds).
narrative: Sustainability-linked loans (SLL): €4.2B portfolio, KPIs aligned with LMA SLL Principles 2023. Green bonds: €1.8B issued + €0.6B held. Transition finance: €0.9B, focus on hard-to-abate sectors (cement, steel).
